'''tanuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadbed|roadbed]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadbed|roadbed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tanuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæniwith|tæniwith]] || [[word:tæniwij|tæniwij]] || [[word:tæniwish|tæniwish]] || [[word:tæniwi|tæniwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tanunuwuth|tanunuwuth]] || [[word:tanunuwuj|tanunuwuj]] || [[word:tanunuwush|tanunuwush]] || [[word:tanunuwu|tanunuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tanuwuth|tanuwuth]] || [[word:tanuwuj|tanuwuj]] || [[word:tanuwush|tanuwush]] || [[word:tanuwu|tanuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tanufwuth|tanufwuth]] || [[word:tanufwuj|tanufwuj]] || [[word:tanufwush|tanufwush]] || [[word:tanufwuf|tanufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tanuwuthu|tanuwuthu]] || [[word:tanuwuju|tanuwuju]] || [[word:tanuwushu|tanuwushu]] || [[word:tanuwuku|tanuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tanuwuth|tanuwuth]] || [[word:tanuwuj|tanuwuj]] || [[word:tanuwush|tanuwush]] || [[word:tanuwu|tanuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tanuwuthul|tanuwuthul]] || [[word:tanuwujul|tanuwujul]] || [[word:tanuwushul|tanuwushul]] || [[word:tanuwukul|tanuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tanuwuthuthu|tanuwuthuthu]] || [[word:tanuwujuju|tanuwujuju]] || [[word:tanuwushushu|tanuwushushu]] || [[word:tanuwuku|tanuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tanuwuthun|tanuwuthun]] || [[word:tanuwujun|tanuwujun]] || [[word:tanuwushun|tanuwushun]] || [[word:tanuwukun|tanuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tanuwuthuoro|tanuwuthuoro]] || [[word:tanuwujuoro|tanuwujuoro]] || [[word:tanuwushuoro|tanuwushuoro]] || [[word:tanuwukuoro|tanuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
